title: New Resilient, Redundant Source of Secure Network Timing and Synchronization for Power Operators is Now Available

title: Here Are 7 Solid Buys in Semiconductor Stocks Says Jefferies
text: Tightness in the supply of semiconductors and recurring coronavirus outbreaks in China have affected the supply of everything from automobiles to smartphones.
